title: IVR - Extension Pack
description: IVR - Extension Pack, optimises part of block texture and GUI in KCR Styles for Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) and LU Mod
body:
![Platform Under Extension Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e4264eb0514dd2491a97a108ede8f8e39c00d96.jpeg)

**Overview** --- This pack have optimised part of block items or more features for environment of KCR style. This pack is not **CONTAINING** KCRC Sign. 此材質包並不包括指示牌。 **Before Download 下載須知**
--- No modification or republish is allowed without the author's consent.
未經作者許可，禁止編輯及再發佈作品 **IVR Packs**
--- ![IVR PACK v8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4027e20f1283595bb8707fdc5de0867e234b477b_0.webp) **Contents** --- **MTR:** 1. KCR Clock. 2. KCR Platform Doors, Closed Platform Door Sticker. 3. GUI Improvement (Dashboard, Lift, Escalator and more) 4. Lift, Lift Doors, Lift Control Panel, Buttons 5. Highlighted Rail Node 6. Station Name Panel (tall, wall) 7. Ceiling 8. Correct zh-hk language. **Joban:** 1. Help Line 2. Passenger Information Displays (PIDS) KCR Style **Lu:** 1. Pole
